COSMICA
Celestial chart reading

Begin with your birthplace so COSMICA can anchor the chart to location, then enter your date and time to reveal the full celestial report.

Step 1 of 2
Choose your birth place
City-based location lookup: latitude, longitude, and timezone are pulled automatically from the selected city, so users no longer need to enter those details manually.
This build includes 10,833 deduplicated city entries: Southeast Asia, China, India, and major cities from the Americas. Each city option includes its coordinate pair behind the scenes.
Step 2 of 2
Enter birth date and time
Why time matters: birth time refines the Ascendant, houses, Moon context, and the way the chart becomes personal.
Calibrating chart…
Please wait while COSMICA opens the next gate

Your Chart Overview

Clean Solar View
A simpler planetary layout with text-only labels in the legend below. The Moon now orbits the Earth in the visual model.
Select a planet or house
The description will appear here.
Click any planet in the legend, click a planet in the solar view, or click a house card lower on the page.
Key notes
Compass Wheel View
A more detailed wheel inspired by traditional natal chart layouts. It shows sign sectors, house divisions, planet degrees, and aspect lines in one view.
